packageRules.description: homeassistant is upgraded in lockstep with pytest-homeassistant-custom-component (see AGENTS.md fleet policy). Let helper bumps drive the HA upgrade rather than bumping homeassistant directly.

home-assistant/actions is a first-party action tracked at @master (no stable release tag), so the default 14-day aging never completes (master commits more often than that) and leaves a perpetually blocked digest PR. Apply a shorter 7-day community-vetting buffer here so digest bumps adopt automatically and stay roughly current, while still not pulling a brand-new commit. PyPI packages and tag-pinned actions keep the default 14-day aging.
